title: Classification of Sets by Cardinality
description: A Venn diagram showing the relationship between finite, infinite, countable, and uncountable sets within the universe of all sets.
relationships: Finite Sets and Countably Infinite Sets are disjoint subsets of Infinite Sets
Infinite Sets are partitioned into Countably Infinite and Uncountably Infinite
All Sets contains Finite Sets and Infinite Sets as subsets
